title: Hyperrealistic Landscape Photograph Rugged Yet Tranquil English
sourceTitle: Hyperrealistic Landscape Photograph Rugged Yet Tranquil English
prompt: Hyperrealistic landscape photograph of a rugged yet tranquil English countryside river valley in summer. A wide, fast flowing blue grey river with white capped rapids courses through a glacially carved green valley, narrowing into a shallow clear brook in the foreground with a visible sandy and pebbly riverbed beneath gently rippling water. Lush tufted grass lines both banks; the valley floor opens into flat vivid emerald meadows. On the right bank sits a centuries old stone and whitewashed cottage with rough hewn granite walls, thick weathered straw grey thatched roof, black trimmed windows, and a central chimney, nearly at water level. White sheep graze in the meadow beside it. Foreground features a grassy embankment with wild golden grasses and yellow wildflowers. Deciduous trees and shrubs cluster along the valley floor. Steeply rising emerald hillsides frame both sides. Brilliant summer blue sky with large dramatic cumulus clouds. Natural bright midday sunlight, crisp shadows, sharp focus, wide angle composition from a slightly elevated vantage point looking upstream. National Geographic quality, 24mm lens, f/8, photographic realism. No text, signatures, or floating objects. --ar 3:4 --v 8.1
